sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement system documented for light-gun shooter

special_mechanics.name: Standing Tank (ST) Maneuvering
special_mechanics.description: Player controls positioning and aiming of ST Falcon mech via Super Scope light gun peripheral. Tank movement mechanics not documented in source.

special_mechanics.name: Energy Bolt Charging
special_mechanics.description: ST Falcon charges energy bolts up to three times when player is not firing; fires treble shot once power meters are filled.

special_mechanics.name: Projectile Interception
special_mechanics.description: Player counters enemy fire by intercepting projectiles with own shots; some enemy attacks can only be deflected by energy bolts.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative): Metal Combat is a light-gun shooter requiring Super Scope peripheral. Movement physics are not applicable to traditional character mechanics as the player controls a stationary mech's aiming and weapon systems. No horizontal movement, jump, or gravity mechanics documented. Game focuses on targeting, weapon charging, and tactical interception rather than platforming physics.
